## ЁЯОп KEY FEATURES NOW AVAILABLE

### For Solar Engineers ЁЯПЧя╕П
- **3D Design Canvas:** Drag 3D panels onto roof, see real-time shading heatmap
- **Shading Analysis:** Solar geometry algorithm calculates shadows at 8am, 12pm, 4pm
- **Production Estimates:** Automatic kWh/day calculations based on panel layout
- **Wiring Diagrams:** Automatic electrical diagrams (DC side, AC side, battery storage)
- **PDF Export:** Professional quotes locked until payment (70% paywall)

### For Sales Teams ЁЯТ╝
- **Voice Quotes:** "Add 4 more panels on west side" тЖТ Instant quote update
- **Bill Parser:** Upload utility bills тЖТ AI extracts data тЖТ Quote generated in 3 seconds
- **Equipment Database:** 500+ inverters, panels, batteries with live pricing
- **Conversion Tracking:** Monitor quote-to-sale conversion pipeline

### For Customers ЁЯСе
- **Interactive Design:** See their exact roof in 3D with panels positioned
- **Shading Analysis:** "North-east section shaded until 10am. Recommend west relocation."
- **Fault Codes:** Type error code тЖТ Get solution steps & video tutorials
- **Maintenance Reminders:** Email/SMS notifications for quarterly inspections

### For Operations ЁЯФз
- **Automated Maintenance:** 5-tier schedule (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, yearly)
- **Repair Guides:** 20+ detailed procedures with tools/parts lists
- **Live Monitoring:** Real-time production, battery state, efficiency metrics
- **Audit Trails:** All changes logged for compliance

## ЁЯТ╗ TECHNICAL ARCHITECTURE

### Frontend Stack (React + Three.js)
```
тЬЕ 3D Design Studio        тЖТ Canvas + Solar geometry engine
тЬЕ 3D Viewer              тЖТ Three.js WebGL + OrbitControls
тЬЕ Voice Commands         тЖТ Web Speech API + GPT-4o
тЬЕ Fault Search          тЖТ Semantic search engine
тЬЕ Quote Parser          тЖТ Drag-drop file upload
тЬЕ Project Workflow      тЖТ React state machine
тЬЕ Wiring Diagrams       тЖТ SVG rendering
тЬЕ Responsive UI/UX      тЖТ Mobile-first design
```

### Backend Services (TypeScript)
```
тЬЕ NASA POWER API         тЖТ Solar irradiance data
тЬЕ NLP Quote Parser       тЖТ PDF/Excel/OCR extraction
тЬЕ Shading Engine        тЖТ Solar position algorithm
тЬЕ Semantic Search       тЖТ Levenshtein + token matching
тЬЕ Maintenance Cron      тЖТ Automated scheduling
тЬЕ Email/SMS Alerts      тЖТ Nodemailer + Twilio-ready
тЬЕ 3D Model Generation   тЖТ Automatic diagram creation
```

### Data & Storage
```
тЬЕ PostgreSQL            тЖТ Relational data
тЬЕ Redis Cache           тЖТ Performance optimization
тЬЕ MQTT                  тЖТ Real-time device data
тЬЕ S3 Compatible         тЖТ PDF/image storage
```

### Revenue Drivers
